rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ELIZABETH RESNICK TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On Portion Of The Pleadings; Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Nicole Stevens' Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied. Section 438(c) allows a "plaintiff" to move for judgment. Ms. Stevens did not bring the petition on which she moves for judgment, and she is not a "plaintiff" entitled to seek judgment on a petition brought by a different party. Her status as a beneficiary does not change the analysis. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the hearing must so notify all other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Tuesday, June 17, 2014.
